activity_1_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වචන නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_d.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_e.text:
Read along.

ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

content.sentence_text: They are going to change all the light 'b'ul'b's safely.
She is not going to check the ca'b'le connection under the table.
Are you going to switch off the circuit 'b'reaker on the wall?
Is he going to turn the control kno'b' gently when the light comes on?

example.text:
Listen to the model dialogue.
ආදර්ශ සංවාදයට සවන් දෙන්න.
மாதிரி உரையாடலை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:
Match the words with the pictures.
පදයන් පින්තූර සමග ගැලපන්න.
சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_c.text:

activity_2_d.text:

ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

activity_2_e.text:
Listen to each question, use the pause to answer it, then compare your response with the model answer.
සෑම ප්‍රශ්නයකටම සවන් දෙන්න, පිළිතුරු දීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
ஒவ்வொரு கேள்வியையும் கேட்டு, இடைவெளியைப் பயன்படுத்தி பதிலளியுங்கள். பின்னர் உங்கள் பதிலை மாதிரி பதிலுடன் ஒப்பிடுங்கள்.

tables: Sunday / Monday / Tuesday / Wednesday / Thursday / Friday / Saturday
January / February / March / April / May / June / July / August / September / October / November / December
right now / right away / immediately / at once

example_dialogues.text_a: When are you going to strip the insulation?
example_dialogues.text_b: I’m going to strip it tomorrow morning.

example_dialogues.text_a: When are you going to mount the inverter panel?
example_dialogues.text_b: I’m going to mount it today.

example_dialogues.text_a: When are you going to test the continuity?
example_dialogues.text_b: I’m going to test it this afternoon.

dialogues.text_a: When are you going to install the conduit pipes?
dialogues.text_b: I’m going to install them on Saturday.

dialogues.text_a: When are you going to crimp the cable ends?
dialogues.text_b: I’m going to crimp them after lunch.

dialogues.text_a: When are you going to open the panel board?
dialogues.text_b: I’m going to open it next week.

dialogues.text_a: When are you going to fix the LED fittings?
dialogues.text_b: I’m going to fix them this evening.

dialogues.text_a: When are you going to label the circuit breakers?
dialogues.text_b: I’m going to label them right now.

dialogues.text_a: When are you going to measure the voltage output?
dialogues.text_b: I’m going to measure it on Monday.

activity_a.text:
Choose the correct answer.
 නිවැරදි පිළිතුර තෝරන්න.
 சரியான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

examples.sentence: When is the mechanical workshop supervisor going to submit the weekly maintenance report?
options: He is going submit it tomorrow.
He is going to submit it on the 30th March.
examples.answer: He is going to submit it on the 30th March.

content.sentence: When is the office manager going to prepare the monthly financial report?
options: She is going to prepare it this afternoon.
She is going to prepare them this morning.
content.answer: She is going to prepare it this afternoon.

content.sentence: When do the ICT trainees update the customer billing system?
options: They updated it yesterday at 10 a.m.
They update it every day at 4 p.m.
They are going to update it tomorrow.
content.answer: They update it every day at 4 p.m.

content.sentence: When does the mechanical repair shop open for customers?
options: It is going to open at 10 p.m.
It opens at 8 a.m. every day.
content.answer: It opens at 8 a.m. every day.

content.sentence: When is the construction accounts clerk going to send the pro-forma invoices?
options: He is going to send them before 3 p.m. today.
content.answer: He is going to send them before 3 p.m. today.

content.sentence: When does the purchasing officer request quotations for consumables?
options: She is going to request them this weekend.

content.sentence: When is the management team going to finalise the next training schedule?
options: They are going to finalise it tomorrow morning.
content.answer: They are going to finalise it tomorrow morning.

content.sentence: When is the receptionist going to print trainee attendance sheets?
options: She is going to print them now.
content.answer: She is going to print them now.

content.sentence: When do the finance officers check the petty cash balance?
options: They check it at the end of each day.
They are going to check it next Wednesday.
content.answer: They check it at the end of each day.

content.sentence: When is the office administrator going to update the stock-control spreadsheet?
options: She is going to update it after lunch.
content.answer: She is going to update it after lunch.

content.sentence: When does the garage owner order spare spark plugs?
options: He is going to order them next Monday.

activity_a.text:
Fill in the blanks with the correct noun.
නිවැරදි නාම පදය භාවිතා කර හිස් තැන් පුරවන්න.
சரியான பெயர்ச்சொல்லை பயன்படுத்தி வெற்றிடங்களை நிரப்புங்கள்.

activity_b.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_c.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_d.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_e.text: Read along. පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න. ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

Questions.question: Why does Thilan call Pradeep to the store room?
Questions.answer: He is going to check the stock before wiring tasks.
options: He wants him to check the tools.
He is going to check the stock before wiring tasks.
He wants him to start the wiring class.

Questions.question: How many full rolls of PVC cable are left?
Why do they need more junction boxes?
Questions.answer: They use many for ceiling work.
options: They use many for ceiling work.
They are building a new workshop.

Questions.question: What is Pradeep going to do at the end?
Questions.answer: Send a message and call the supplier.
options: Send a message and call the supplier.

activity_c.text: Pradeep, can you come to the electrical store room for a moment?
I’m going to check the stock before we start the wiring tasks this afternoon.
Sure, sir.
I’m here.
What should we begin with?
First, do we have enough PVC cables?
We usually need at least three full rolls for the house-wiring projects.
Let me check… There is only one full roll left, and another half-used one.
So we don’t have enough, sir.
Hmm. How many circuit breakers do we have?
Circuit breakers are low too.
Only four pieces are remaining.
That’s not good.
What about junction boxes?
We use a lot of them for ceiling work.
Junction boxes are running out.
There’s just one small bundle here.
Right. How many LED bulbs do we have for replacements?
LED bulbs are okay.
We have one full carton.
Good. And how much insulation tape do we have?
We go through it very quickly during training sessions.
Insulation tape is almost finished, sir.
Only two rolls remain.
That definitely won’t be enough.
Do we have enough plug tops?
No, sir.
We have only five plug tops left.
Alright. Let’s order more.
Should I add PVC cables, circuit breakers, junction boxes, insulation tape, and plug tops to the order list?
Yes, please.
We’re going to need everything for the practical sessions.
Why don’t we place the order immediately before the supplier finishes deliveries for the day?
I’m going to send him a message and call him right after.
Good. That should help us avoid delays when the trainees start wiring later.

activity_d.text: I’m going to check the stock before we start the wiring tasks this afternoon.
We usually need at least three full rolls for the house-wiring projects.
So we don’t have enough, sir.
We use a lot of them for ceiling work.
Right. How many LED bulbs do we have for replacements?
We go through it very quickly during training sessions.
Insulation tape is almost finished, sir.
Good. That should help us avoid delays when the trainees start wiring later.

activity_e.text: I’m going to check the stock before we start the wiring tasks this afternoon.
We usually need at least three full rolls for the house-wiring projects.
So we don’t have enough, sir.
We use a lot of them for ceiling work.
Right. How many LED bulbs do we have for replacements?
We go through it very quickly during training sessions.
Insulation tape is almost finished, sir.
Good. That should help us avoid delays when the trainees start wiring later.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම පියවරන් ඔබට මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට උදව් කරනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.
වීඩියෝව වර දෙකක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Explain any new words using Google Translator.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන කිහිපයක් විස්තර කරන්න.
Google மொழிபெயர்ப்பாளரைப் பயன்படுத்தி சில புதிய வார்த்தைகளை விளக்குங்கள்.

Listen and repeat.

கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

Watch the video.
වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.
